data.label: ABOUT
paragraphs: I am a PhD candidate in Coffee Science at {Caffeine Tech|#}, under the supervision of Dr. Percolator and Prof. French Press. My dissertation, The Science of a Better Cup: Understanding Coffee Flavor Through Roasting and Brewing, explores how different roasting and brewing methods change the taste, aroma, and quality of coffee.

My research brings together coffee chemistry, brewing science, and sensory analysis to better understand how coffee is made and enjoyed. I study how factors such as coffee beans, roasting, grinding, and brewing influence flavor and consistency.

My main goal right now is to find my favorite green coffee cup, which seems to have vanished entirely. I have a strong suspicion it is currently sitting in the back of the microwave from a previous reheating attempt.
